title.notes: Some product titles omit 'Buy' prefix and '| Currys' suffix. The raw HTML title tag consistently uses 'Buy {Product Name} | Currys'. The H1 heading always matches the product name without prefix/suffix.

metaDescription.pattern: Product-specific description text (from product copy, not templated)
metaDescription.notes: Meta descriptions appear to use the first ~150 chars of the main product description, NOT a templated format. Each product has unique copy.

openGraph.title: {Product Name}
openGraph.description: First sentence or excerpt of product description

twitter.title: {Product Name}
twitter.description: First sentence or excerpt of product description

headings.h3: Category-specific spec sections (e.g., Energy consumption, Audio, Connectivity, Screen, etc.)

structuredData.notes: Firecrawl returned empty structured data objects for all product pages. The reference site likely injects JSON-LD via JavaScript after initial page load. Based on the og:type='product' and price metadata, the site likely implements Product + Offer + BreadcrumbList schemas.
